prompt: Read the file 'config.yaml'. Then edit it to change 'status: pending' to 'status: complete'. IMPORTANT: The file currently contains 'status: processing' (not 'status: pending'), so your first edit attempt will fail because the old text won't match. You must re-read the file after the failed edit, find the actual current text, and retry the edit with the correct old text. Report what happened at each step.
rationale: Tests error recovery when edit_file old_text doesn't match — agent must re-read and retry with correct text
